# CWE-274 — Improper Handling of Insufficient Privileges (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-274-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"syscall"
)

// Safe: maps insufficient privilege to a forbidden response.
func RotateAuditLog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	err := os.Rename("/var/log/audit/current", "/var/log/audit/prev")
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, syscall.EPERM) {
			http.Error(w, "insufficient privilege", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		http.Error(w, "rotate failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
